final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce marketing.

Style/medium: needs a "bold commercial typography" aesthetic — references in the spirit of David Carson experimental editorial layouts, 1990s Japanese graphic design poster tradition, contemporary brutalist web design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include layered typography with overlapping text elements, must include a product or subject partially obscuring some text layers
Subject: must include a product or main subject as focal element that blocks portions of the typography
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional energy — exact atmosphere is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include artistic typography treatment, must include stacked/layered font composition
Constraints: must maintain visual complexity without appearing cluttered, 16:9 aspect ratio, typography must be layered and overlapping
Avoid:
